capabilities.summary: Full 15/15 proof coverage: Generated, Built, Previewed, Reviewed, Launch Evaluated; execution generalization 96/100; verification stage 0%.

capabilities.name: Capability Audit V2
capabilities.summary: Prior capability audit baseline; 87 capabilities, 15 categories; identified Real Build Execution as rank-1 gap (now closed).

capabilities.summary: No operational monitoring or observability stack for generated apps.

capabilities.summary: Recovery hardening analysis exists; no automated production rollback path.

capabilities.name: Release Approval

capabilities.name: Operational Safeguards
capabilities.summary: Execution readiness and planning gates provide pre-build safeguards; production ops safeguards missing.

gaps: Real Build Execution proven outside World2 isolation boundary
Phase 7, Phase 15, and Phase 24E–24Y eras still parallel
Large-scale validation harness not wired to Real Build Execution Pipeline
world2Assessment.nextPhaseRationale: UVL Verification Execution is the highest-priority gap — Real Build Execution V1.1 proves build/preview/launch at 100% but verifiedCount is 0/15. World2 should follow verification wiring and canonical ownership registration.

dimensions.detail: No production readiness gate module; launch readiness covers blueprint suites only.
Scale readiness authority is advisory; no validated deployment pipeline.
No observability or health monitoring for deployed generated apps.
Reliability hardening analyzes recovery; automated rollback not implemented.
AFLA launch approval proven for 15-suite; production release approval path absent.
Pre-build execution and planning gates exist; production operational safeguards missing.

codeGeneration.detail: Code Generation Engine V1 materializes 5 CRUD profiles with 100% success in Real Build Execution V1.1 (15 categories). Cannot yet generate complex workflows, multi-role systems, advanced business logic, or arbitrary domain-specific applications beyond CRUD-adjacent patterns.

pipelineStages.evidence: CQI Maturity V1 passes domain prompts; large-scale validation shows low requirement confidence for diverse categories.
Planning Gate Authority and brief generators validated; RBEP suite completes planning phase.
Real Build Execution V1.1: generationSuccessRate 100% across 15 categories.
Real Build Execution V1.1: buildSuccessRate 100%, materializationSuccessRate 100%.
Real Build Execution V1.1: previewSuccessRate 100%, previewedCount 15/15.
Real Build Execution V1.1: verifiedCount 0/15 — UVL verification execution not wired.
Real Build Execution V1.1: reviewedCount 15/15; founder review panel integrated.
Real Build Execution V1.1: aflaVerdictCount 15/15, launchSuccessRate 100%.

closedGapsSinceV2: Real build execution beyond simulation (Real Build Execution Pipeline V1/V1.1 PASS)
15/15 category proof chain: Generated → Built → Previewed → Reviewed → Launch Evaluated
highestPriorityGap: UVL Verification Execution — verifiedCount 0/15 in Real Build Execution V1.1 proof coverage
